message.content:
@startuml
package "com" as com
  package "prototype" as prototype
    interface IHeroFactory
      interface IHeroFactoryImpl
      interface IPrototype
      interface IBeast
      interface IMage
      interface IWarlord
      interface IElfBeast
      interface IOrcBeast
      interface IElfWarlord
      interface IOrcWarlord
      interface IElfMage
      interface IOrcMage
      interface IApp
      interface IPrototype

    actor App
      App()
      main(args : String[])

    actor IHeroFactory
      createBeast() : Beast
      createMage() : Mage
      createWarlord() : Warlord

    actor IHeroFactoryImpl
    IHeroFactoryImpl(mage : Mage, warlord : Warlord, beast : Beast)
    createBeast() : Beast
    createMage() : Mage
    createWarlord() : Warlord

    actor IPrototype
    IPrototype()
    clone() : Object

    actor IBeast
    IBeast()
    clone() : Beast
    toString() : String

    actor IMage
    IMage()
    clone() : Mage
    toString() : String

    actor IWarlord
    IWarlord()
    clone() : Warlord
    toString() : String

    actor IElfBeast
    IElfBeast()
    clone() : Beast
    toString() : String

    actor IOrcBeast
    IOrcBeast()
    clone() : Beast
    toString() : String

    actor IElfWarlord
    IElfWarlord()

    toString() : String

    actor IOrcWarlord
    IOrcWarlord()

    toString() : String

    actor IElfMage

    toString() : String

    actor IOrcMage
    IOrcMage()

    actor IApp
    App()

    IHeroFactory
    IHeroFactoryImpl

    IBeast
